title: Vade
description: Like Vape but not, its not a hacked client, its just a joke overlay you can use to prank people with
body:
![Vade Feat Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5Jz0B96Q/images/7b1eb8581c46247c3dcae6477e540b1e9dc4a951.png)

Enjoy!
